content.title: TaskFlow Pro — Project Test Strategy
content.scope: End-to-end test coverage for all four epics: Core Platform, AI Engine, Focus Mode, and Integrations. Covers unit, integration, component, E2E, and performance testing.
content.description: Comprehensive testing strategy following the testing pyramid approach with high unit test coverage as the foundation.
content.approach: Pyramid strategy: high unit test coverage (85%+), targeted integration tests for module boundaries and external APIs, E2E tests for critical user journeys, performance tests for scale targets.

coverageTargets.target: All module boundaries and external API contracts

riskAreas: AI scoring accuracy — high risk, high impact on user trust
Real-time sync — medium risk, high impact on collaboration UX
Focus mode notification batching — medium risk, core value proposition
GitHub webhook processing — low risk but user-facing data integrity
